zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Curtice於1686年7月11日出生在美國紐約州素福爾可素爾德時，她的父親Caleb Curtice39歲，母親Elizabeth Ryder37歲。她於1716年4月2日與Thomas White在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可謝爾特 易曼德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1749年4月26日在美國紐約州素福爾可謝爾特 易曼德享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Curtice于1686年7月11日出生在美国纽约州素福爾可素爾德时，她的父亲Caleb Curtice39岁，母亲Elizabeth Ryder37岁。她于1716年4月2日与Thomas White在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可謝爾特 易曼德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1749年4月26日在美国纽约州素福爾可謝爾特 易曼德享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Curtice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly an altered form of North German   Gerdes  .

variants.name: Curtis
meanings: English: nickname for a refined person, sometimes perhaps given ironically, from Middle English, Old French courteis, courtois, curtis ‘courtly, refined, urbane’ (derivative of Old French court; see Court 1).

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Curtice was born on 11 July 1686, in Southold, Suffolk, New York, United States, her father, Caleb Curtice, was 39 and her mother, Elizabeth Ryder, was 37. She married Thomas White on 2 April 1716, in Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 26 April 1749, in Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York, United States, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Curtice est née le 11 juillet 1686, à Southold, Suffolk, New York, États-Unis, son père, Caleb Curtice, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Ryder, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas White le 2 avril 1716, à Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 26 avril 1749, à Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Curtice am 11. Juli 1686 in Southold, Suffolk, New York, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Caleb Curtice 39 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Ryder 37. Sie hat am 2. April 1716 in Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America Thomas White geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 26. April 1749 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Curtice è nata il il 11 luglio 1686 nel Southold, Suffolk, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Caleb Curtice, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Ryder, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Thomas White il 2 aprile 1716, nel Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 26 aprile 1749, nel Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.Southold, Suffolk, New York, British Col: イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニースフォルクソウソルド
ja.Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York, Briti: アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州スフォルクシェルター イスランド
ja.Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, Brit: イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニースフォルクソウソルド
ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Curticeが1686年7月11日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州スフォルクソウソルドで生まれた時，父Caleb Curticeは39歳，母Elizabeth Ryderは37歳であった。1716年4月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニースフォルクシェルター イスランドでThomas Whiteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1749年4月26日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州スフォルクシェルター イスランドで62歳で死去した。

ko.Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크 셸터 이슬랜드
ko.Southold, Suffolk, New York, British Ame: 미국 뉴욕 주 수폴크 소우토드 소우토드
ko.Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York, Briti: 미국 뉴욕 주 수폴크 셸터 이슬랜드 셸터 이슬랜드
ko.Southold, Suffolk, New York, British Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크 소우토드
ko.Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York, Briti: 미국 뉴욕 주 수폴크 셸터 이슬랜드
ko.Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크 소우토드
ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Curtice(이)가 1686년 7월 11일 미국 뉴욕 주 수폴크 소우토드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Caleb Curtice(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Ryder(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1716년 4월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크 셸터 이슬랜드에서 Thomas White(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1749년 4월 26일 미국 뉴욕 주 수폴크 셸터 이슬랜드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Curtice nasceu em 11 de julho de 1686, em Southold, Suffolk, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Caleb Curtice, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Ryder, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas White em 2 de abril de 1716, em Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 26 de abril de 1749, em Shelter Island, Suffolk, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Curtice родилась 11 июля 1686 г. в местности соутолд, суффолк, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Caleb Curtice было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Ryder, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas White 2 апреля 1716 г. в местности шелтир исланд, суффолк, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 26 апреля 1749 г. в местности шелтир исланд, суффолк, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Curtice nació el 11 de julio de 1686, en Southold, Suffolk, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, su papá, Caleb Curtice, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Ryder, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Thomas White el 2 de abril de 1716, en Shelter Island, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 26 de abril de 1749, en Shelter Island, Suffolk, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 62 años.
